song.title: Oh Jesus, Jesus, Wonderful Jesus
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A Bm A Oh Jesus, Jesus, wonderful Jesus .G A D A Who art enthroned in heav'n above, .D A G A Crowned both with glory and with honor, . D A G A Attract us by Thy charming love.
[C]
.D A G A Oh! Jesus, Jesus, most desired, .D A G A Oh! Jesus, Jesus, dearest Lord, .D A G A Thy charming beauty us has captured, . Em A7 A D We love, we love Thee, precious Lord.
[V2] Thy glory is the splendor related To Thy dear person, Jesus Lord; While honor is the preciousness Related to Thine own great worth.
[V3] Thou art dear Lord the greatest attraction Within the universe to see, And like unto an immense magnet, Drawing Thy seekers unto thee.
[V4] Without Thyself, the charming object, How could we from all things turn away? How could we from so many distractions Upon this earth, Lord, look away?
